title: Archery Clash! — Arrow Chain Apocalypse
gameplay_hook: One shot triggers a chain of arrow kills that breaks the entire level
concept: Player is one arrow away from elimination — fires a desperate shot that chains into an unstoppable kill streak, upgrades explode, and the gear collection screen detonates with rewards
scenario_prompt: IMAGE-TO-VIDEO CONTINUATION from a real Archery Clash! gameplay screenshot — same 3D stylized cartoonish art, same vibrant palette, same isometric camera locked at game's natural angle, same in-game UI always visible. BEAT 1 (0–2s): First-person POV just behind the female protagonist's shoulder, her health bar (#2A9DF4 blue) flashing at ONE final sliver in the top-left UI panel, enemy archer 40 meters across the arena is drawing back a glowing #FFD700 golden arrow aimed dead-center at her chest — trajectory arc line curves directly at her — spoken dialogue on screen: 'NOOOOO SHE'S ABOUT TO GET ONE-SHOTTED!!' — SFX: bowstring creak, tension hum building — camera micro-trembles. BEAT 2 (2–5s): Protagonist finger-swipes the aiming arc in a sharp diagonal, releases arrow with a WHOOSH crunch — arrow punches through the enemy's bow mid-draw, SHATTERS it into spinning #FFD700 gold splinters — CHAIN REACTION: arrow ricochets off the arena wall with a metallic CLANG, pierces a second enemy appearing from the left, bounces again with a POP and tags a third — kill feed UI in top-right stacks three red 'ELIMINATED' banners in rapid succession — score counter in bottom-right rips from 1,200 to 8,700 in a blur — spoken dialogue: 'OH MY GOD SHE HIT ALL THREE WITH ONE ARROW!! THE CHAIN WON'T STOP!!' — SFX: triple impact thuds, score ticker screaming. BEAT 3 (5–8s): Camera SLAMS to extreme close-up behind the protagonist's bow as the upgrade screen ERUPTS — gear collection UI floods the screen, three new weapons unlock simultaneously with #32CD32 green burst flashes, level progression bar at bottom smashes through LEVEL UP with a shockwave ripple across the entire UI, score counter cracks past 25,000 and the digits visually break apart — spoken dialogue: 'THIS IS THE MOST INSANE ARCHERY COMBO I LITERALLY CANNOT STOP AHHHHH' — SFX: cascading reward pops, level-up horn blast, coins raining sfx — 9:16 vertical, 8 seconds total, UI overlay locked on screen throughout. FINAL FRAME (last 1s): gameplay dims slightly, bold centered white text reads 'Archery Clash!' with smaller text below 'Play now' — static, clean, no animation, title over live gameplay.
narration_script: NOOOOO SHE'S ABOUT TO GET ONE-SHOTTED!! ... OH MY GOD SHE HIT ALL THREE WITH ONE ARROW!! THE CHAIN WON'T STOP!! ... THIS IS THE MOST INSANE ARCHERY COMBO I LITERALLY CANNOT STOP AHHHHH
